Off Calendar Oct-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Donald R. Wild for defendant and moving party Soufiane Jebali
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE: Clarice Letizia for plaintiff and opposing party Kayla Johnson

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Jebali's motion to compel further responses to request for production set #2 is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to request #14. The motion is denied as to request #15. As to request #16, plaintiff is ordered to produce color photocopies of the specified photographs in her custody or control. All request for monetary sanctions are denied.
Production of the videotape within 10 days. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
